scope: bounded no-solution certificate for selected coupon synthesis universe
requiredAssumptions: candidate universe is finite and explicitly enumerated
each refuted candidate is interpreted inside the selected measurement universe
coverageAssumptions: certificate cases cover the recorded candidate refs
unsupported constructs are reported rather than discharged
exactnessAssumptions: constraint refs name the selected bounded synthesis package inputs
case evidence refs name the selected obstruction witnesses
unsupportedConstructs: unbounded candidate generation is outside no-solution-certificate-v0

cases.reason: candidate preserves the forbidden cache dependency in the selected static universe
candidate does not discharge the selected coupon / discount observation contract

nonConclusions: valid certificate soundness is conditional on recorded assumptions
solver no-candidate result is not a no-solution certificate
candidate search exhaustion is scoped to recorded cases
